channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Zenith System:Paragon of Seraphs
item.description: Forge your path to Apotheosis -- A Mahoraga inspired mod

item.title: More Nails
item.description: Higher-tier metal ingots yield more nails when forged.

item.title: Ghaelen's Tweaks
item.description: My personal tweaks I like to play with.

item.title: Free The Horse
item.description: Big buff medieval semi-truck spawning wild in your area.

item.title: Sound Of Confession
item.description: Adds church bells.

item.title: WOO³
item.description: A modpack that contains custom content and server tweaks for the Whispers of Oldwood season 3.

item.title: String Editor
item.description: The Transform Designer of Localization authoring. Word processing, it's simple.

item.title: Firearms Patch
item.description: Changes the musket to deal equivalent damage to the Windlass with steel bolts.

item.title: Salty´s Immersive: Lanterns
item.description: Lanterns that flicker, react to movement and wind, swinging and make noise.

item.title: All The Stats
item.description: A dual-purpose library for players and mod creators interested in new stats for traits and recipes.

item.title: Player Model lib
item.description: Library for adding new player races

item.title: ToE Patches
item.description: A collection of all patches for the ToE Server

item.title: Dragonia Server Mod Patch
item.description: Меняет генерацию железа и добавляет новый крафт льняного шпагата

item.title: Vintage Stuff Classes
item.description: A mod for our server that combines different class mods to kitbash our own personal classes

item.title: Alternative armor designs
item.description: With this mod, you can make use of all game armor designs for each equivalent armor type.

item.title: Dragonia Translations
item.description: Переводы и отредактированные переводы под стиль сервера.

item.title: Wind Vanes & Randomized Winds
item.description: Wind vanes that rotate to face the wind direction and spins its rotator based on wind speed.

item.title: Storage Tweaks
item.description: Adds compact/sort and quick-unload buttons to chests and inventory.

item.title: Wild Farming Fork
item.description: Cultivate flowers, herbs, mushrooms, trees, and shrubs. And much more.

item.title: Bark Canoe
item.description: Bark Canoe - Fork of iuno Orignal Canoe Mod

item.title: Fast Mushroom Harvesting
item.description: You don't need tools to pick mushrooms, it's easy and quick to pick them by hand.

item.title: Ithania Expanded Fishing
item.description: Raise your own worms, craft custom baits, and trap live fish. Fishing, fully expanded.

item.title: Wall calendar
item.description: A parchment calendar hung by twine, each day tracked by hand in chalk

item.title: Tetromine's Tweaks
item.description: An assortments of tweaks to vanilla content as well as tweaks to existing mods for Vintage Story.

item.title: Immersive Machina
item.description: A compatibility bridge between Immersive Mining and Eco Machina!

item.title: Struggle To Sleep
item.description: Not snuggle, STRUGGLE! You can only sleep if certain conditions are met.

item.title: Salty´s Clear View
item.description: Fades blocks blocking the third person camera!

item.title: CollapseStory
item.description: Adds structural and material physics to building blocks, and greatly expands beam functionality.

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Leaf Litter
item.description: Adds dynamic leaf litter that can be raked, composted, and used as mulch.
